prompt: Three users in the last hour have reported the same login error. Should I treat these as duplicates?

Find tickets that were escalated to engineering this month and group them by product component.
How do you decide when to escalate a ticket to a human?

That tone is too formal. Make it more conversational.
Hold off escalating — let me try one more reply first. Draft something more empathetic.
Quick one — what would you say to this customer?
